scripts.start:docker: node -e "const { spawnSync } = require('node:child_process'); const args = process.argv.slice(1); const rebuild = args.includes('--rebuild'); const dockerArgs = ['compose', '--env-file', '.dockerenvfile', 'up', ...(rebuild ? ['--build'] : [])]; const result = spawnSync('docker', dockerArgs, { cwd: 'apps/server', stdio: 'inherit' }); process.exit(result.status ?? 1);" --
scripts.test: pnpm --filter server exec vitest run src/app/services/pr src/app/adapters src/app/api src/app/middlewares --exclude "**/*.integration.test.ts"
scripts.clean: pnpm turbo run clean && rm -rf node_modules
